summary:
AGO2 is involved in RNA interference and mRNA degradation via the RISC complex, functioning independently of cellular divisions involving cytoskeletal components. There is no molecular or functional connection linking AGO2 to the cytoskeletal mechanisms required for cytokinesis.  

\boxed{B}

agent2 (Round 2 summarized): AGO2 is involved in RNA interference and mRNA degradation via the RISC complex, functioning independently of cellular divisions involving cytoskeletal components. There is no molecular or functional connection linking AGO2 to the cytoskeletal mechanisms required for cytokinesis.  

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
